description_long: This is a young adult male standing with arms extended horizontally, dressed in casual urban attire. He wears a button-up shirt over a t-shirt, paired with fitted pants and classic lace-up sneakers. His hair is styled in a medium-length bun at the back of his head, and his facial features are well-defined with a short beard. The clothing fits loosely, suggesting comfort and ease of movement, suitable for everyday city environments. The figure's proportions and posture are realistic, and the overall appearance is clean and modern. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a button-up shirt, t-shirt, pants, and sneakers, standing with arms outstretched. He has a medium-length bun hairstyle and a short beard.
description_view_0: Back view showing the shirt's length, the bun hairstyle, and the back of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the bun, and the layered shirt and t-shirt.
description_view_2: Front view displaying facial features, open shirt over a t-shirt, and the laced sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, bun, and the fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt over a t-shirt with fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair tied in a bun
